# Soft60 Reserved32 Micro2 Contract

## Soft 60
full compaction soft trigger defaults to 0.60 and async/swarm-micro to 0.48 so long sessions reclaim earlier

## Reserved 32k
full compaction reserved context headroom defaults to 32k tokens so long sessions reclaim earlier while keeping summary room

## Micro 2
micro compaction keeps the last 2 messages and clears tool results from 16 tokens so bulky tool output reclaims earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/micro/status vitest
